title: Simple due date based on Push not working
excerpt:
I am using this template - 
When an item is created set DATE to today and Push Date 1 by 3 days… 
All that is populated is the DATE field with Today’s date. The Date 1 never is populated. 
If I change the Date 1 to DATE …

posts.author: FLaMike1984 (Michael Crawford)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am using this template -
When an item is created set DATE to today and Push Date 1 by 3 days…

All that is populated is the DATE field with Today’s date. The Date 1 never is populated.
If I change the Date 1 to DATE then the Date column will add 3 to todays date.

What am I missing? I am very new to all of this.

thanks,

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@FLaMike1984

From what it sounds, you need to also the date 1 to today before pushing it.

Jim - The Monday Man (YouTube Channel)

posts.author: FLaMike1984 (Michael Crawford)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you … Thank you…That was the piece I was missing…
